meta.title: Advanced Passive & Causative Structures
meta.description: Master complex passive formations, causatives, and get-passive structures.
meta.description_ko: 복잡한 수동태 형성, 사역 구조, get-수동태를 학습합니다.

explanation.en: Both express causative meaning (arranging for someone else to do something). 'Get' is more informal.
explanation.ko: 둘 다 사역 의미(다른 사람에게 시키기). 'get'이 더 비격식체.

questions.prompt: 'have something done'과 'get something done'의 차이는?
choices: 'have'는 더 격식체, 'get'은 더 비격식/구어적이지만 의미는 유사

explanation.en: 'Have + object + past participle' = causative (arranged for someone else to do it).
explanation.ko: 'have + 목적어 + 과거분사' = 사역 (다른 사람에게 시키다).

questions.prompt: The politician _____ her biography written by a ghostwriter.

explanation.en: 'Have + object + past participle' can express an unwanted experience happening TO the subject.
explanation.ko: 'have + 목적어 + 과거분사'는 주어에게 일어난 원치 않는 경험을 나타낼 수 있습니다.

questions.prompt: 'She had her car stolen last night.' — 이 문장의 특징은?
choices: 원치 않은 일이 일어났음을 나타내는 사역 수동 — 의도 없음

explanation.en: 'Had + object + past participle' = causative: the CEO arranged for it to be rewritten.
explanation.ko: 'had + 목적어 + 과거분사' = 사역: CEO가 다시 쓰도록 지시했다.

questions.prompt: 다음 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하세요.
questions.answer: The CEO had the entire report rewritten before the board meeting.

explanation.en: 'To have been + past participle' = perfect passive infinitive, action before the reporting time.
explanation.ko: 'to have been + 과거분사' = 완료 수동 부정사, 보고 시점 이전의 행동.

questions.prompt: 'The building is reported to have been designed by a renowned architect.' — 이 구조에서 'to have been designed'가 의미하는 것은?

explanation.en: 'Get + object + past participle' = causative passive (arranged for examination).
explanation.ko: 'get + 목적어 + 과거분사' = 사역 수동태 (검토하도록 주선).

questions.prompt: The company got its financial records _____ by an independent auditor.

explanation.en: 'Make + object + base verb' = force/compel. 'Have + object + past participle' = arrange.
explanation.ko: 'make + 목적어 + 동사 원형' = 강제. 'have + 목적어 + 과거분사' = 시키다.

questions.prompt: 'make' 사역 구조와 'have' 사역 구조의 주요 차이는?

explanation.en: Different causative structures and their nuances.
explanation.ko: 다양한 사역 구조와 그 뉘앙스.

questions.prompt: 사역 구조와 의미를 연결하세요.

explanation.en: 'Had + object + base verb' (active causative) = arranged/instructed the assistant to prepare.
explanation.ko: 'had + 목적어 + 동사 원형'(능동 사역) = 준비하도록 지시.

questions.prompt: The surgeon _____ his assistant prepare the instruments before the operation.

explanation.en: 'Get + object + past participle' = causative: arrange for someone else to do it.
explanation.ko: 'get + 목적어 + 과거분사' = 사역: 다른 사람에게 시키다.

questions.prompt: 'The factory gets its machinery serviced every six months.' — 이 문장의 의미는?
choices: 공장이 외부 업체에 기계 정비를 맡긴다

explanation.en: 'Has her nails done' = common causative with personal services.
explanation.ko: 'has her nails done' = 개인 서비스에서 일반적인 사역 표현.

questions.prompt: She _____ her nails done at the salon every week.

explanation.en: 'Be made to + base verb' = passive of 'make' (forced to do something against one's will).
explanation.ko: 'be made to + 동사 원형' = 'make'의 수동태 (강제로 ~하게 됨).

questions.prompt: 수동태에서 'be made to do'의 의미는?

explanation.en: 'Were made to + base verb' = passive causative expressing compulsion.
explanation.ko: 'were made to + 동사 원형' = 강제를 나타내는 수동 사역.

questions.prompt: 다음 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하세요.
questions.answer: The students were made to rewrite their essays after failing the initial assessment.

explanation.en: 'Have your eyes tested' = standard causative for arranging professional services.
explanation.ko: 'have your eyes tested' = 전문 서비스를 주선하는 표준 사역 표현.

questions.prompt: I need to _____ my eyes tested — my vision has deteriorated significantly.

explanation.en: 'Let + object + base verb' = allow/permit (least forceful causative).
explanation.ko: 'let + 목적어 + 동사 원형' = 허용하다 (가장 덜 강제적인 사역).

questions.prompt: 'They let the contract expire without renewal.' — 'let'의 사역 의미는?

explanation.en: 'Had the company restructured' = arranged for restructuring (causative passive).
explanation.ko: 'had the company restructured' = 구조 조정을 주선함 (사역 수동).

questions.prompt: The CEO _____ the company restructured after poor quarterly results.

explanation.en: 'Need + gerund' = passive meaning: 'needs repainting' = 'needs to be repainted'.
explanation.ko: 'need + 동명사' = 수동 의미: 'needs repainting' = 'needs to be repainted'.

questions.prompt: 'The house needs repainting.' — 이 구조의 의미는?
choices: 집 페인트칠이 필요하다 (수동 의미의 need + gerund)

explanation.en: 'Get + object + past participle' (not 'to be + past participle'). 'Got the report completed'.
explanation.ko: 'get + 목적어 + 과거분사'('to be + 과거분사'가 아님). 'got the report completed'.

questions.prompt: 틀린 부분을 찾으세요: 'She got the report to be completed by Friday.'

explanation.en: 'Made + object + base verb' = compelled/ordered (strong causative with authority).
explanation.ko: 'made + 목적어 + 동사 원형' = 강제/명령 (권위를 가진 강한 사역).

questions.prompt: The general _____ his troops advance despite heavy resistance.

explanation.en: 'Have + object + pp': object can be a person or thing. 'Had her hair cut' / 'Had the car repaired'.
explanation.ko: 'have + 목적어 + 과거분사': 목적어는 사람이거나 사물일 수 있습니다.

questions.prompt: 'have + object + past participle'에서 목적어가 항상 사람인가요?

explanation.en: 'Should have + object + past participle' = advisable causative for health.
explanation.ko: 'should have + 목적어 + 과거분사' = 건강을 위한 권장 사역.

questions.prompt: 다음 단어를 올바른 순서로 배열하세요.
questions.answer: You should have your cholesterol levels checked regularly after the age of 40.

explanation.en: 'Had + object + past participle' = formal/professional causative arrangement.
explanation.ko: 'had + 목적어 + 과거분사' = 격식/전문적 사역 주선.

questions.prompt: The director _____ the entire screenplay rewritten three weeks before filming began.

explanation.en: 'Had it repaired by' = professional service causative. Both 'had' and 'got' acceptable.
explanation.ko: 'had it repaired by' = 전문 서비스 사역. 'had'와 'got' 모두 가능.

questions.prompt: 빈칸에 알맞은 것은? 'A: Did you fix the boiler yourself? B: No, I _____ it repaired by a professional.'

explanation.en: Nuanced differences between causative verbs.
explanation.ko: 사역 동사 간의 미묘한 차이.

questions.prompt: 사역 동사와 특징을 연결하세요.
